body:
## Summary

All three review gates now run Claude in a sandboxed subagent. Gate 3 uses stage-then-read ingestion. Codex dispatches via Bash(run_in_background=true).

### R-009: Review Runs In A Sandbox Executor (proposed constitution amendment)

Every AI review in this framework MUST run inside a sandboxed executor — a Claude Code subagent for the in-session Claude pass, `codex exec` for the external pass. Main-session inline review is prohibited.

**Approval gate:** reply `approve R-009 as-is` to accept, `reject R-009: <reason>` to reject.
